2021-22 Cal State Bakersfield Roadrunners Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 9-19 (2-14, 11th in Big West MBB)

Coach: Rod Barnes

PS/G: 64.9 (321st of 358)

PA/G: 66.3 (89th of 358)

SRS: -7.57 (264th of 358)

SOS: -2.01 (189th of 358)

ORtg: 98.9 (265th of 358)

DRtg: 101.1 (198th of 358)

Preseason Odds: Championship +100000
